fixture.description: path (relative to this dir) of the workspace fixture to copy + restore

prompt_file.description: path (relative to this dir) of the prompt text given to codex exec

allowed_paths.description: paths the task MAY modify; a write outside these is a scope violation

forbidden_paths.description: paths that must NOT be touched (explicit out-of-scope)

expected_no_change.description: true for no-change tasks: any production-code diff is an unnecessary change

verification.description: argv arrays run in the workspace; all must exit 0 for acceptance_pass
